concepts.title: Fractions Basics
concepts.subject: math
concepts.short_description: Understand numerator, denominator, and simple comparisons.

steps.title: Parts of a Whole
steps.content_text: A fraction represents equal parts of a whole object.
steps.prompt_to_student: How many equal parts make one whole?

steps.title: Reading 3/4
steps.content_text: In 3/4, 3 is numerator and 4 is denominator.
steps.prompt_to_student: What does the denominator tell you?
